feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: ”What is love if not a sign of God´s presence”
entry.summary:
Author: jayskiara

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,557Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 3

Summary: ”Someone once told me that love is Gods presence and I´m starting to believe her.” He quickly glances as the sky as he remembers the sweet face of his Abuela. She knew before he knew. How he wished she was here to see this.   Or Eddie Diaz finally has a realization.

entry.summary:
Author: exywithacause

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 879Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Buck and Eddie have a strange moment when they almost kiss. Neither of them can think about anything else for a while.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 170,157Chapters: 35/?Kudos: 97

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,456Chapters: 2/24Kudos: 29

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights? When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: Evangaline Buckley Begins
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 86,941Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 542

Summary: Evangaline Buckley has been alone for most of her life. She was unwanted by her parents and left by her sister when she had the first chance. For her most formative years, she had to go to extreme lengths just to get attention from those meant to care for her, failing more often than not. After finding out the truth about her creation, Evie decides that she has to do something – anything. She goes through even more pain and heartbreak before finding herself where she was always meant to end up. -+- This is both a prologue and season 1 rewrite.

entry.title: 𝑴𝒊𝒏𝒆 - 𝑖𝑚𝑝𝑙𝑖𝑐𝑖𝑡𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦, 𝑒𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑛𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦
entry.summary:
Author: Graceful_Ashes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 68,451Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 564

Summary: 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑒𝑠 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑡𝑤𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑑, 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑥𝑡𝑟𝑖𝑐𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑦 𝑠𝑜. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑡𝑟𝑢𝑡ℎ 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑘𝑛𝑜𝑤𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑎𝑚𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦. 𝐼𝑡'𝑠 𝑎 𝑔𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑛𝑑𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑓𝑎𝑐𝑡 𝑎𝑏𝑜𝑢𝑡 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘’𝑠 𝑟𝑒𝑙𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑠ℎ𝑖𝑝. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑟𝑒 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑝𝑟𝑒𝑐𝑖𝑝𝑖𝑐𝑒 𝑜𝑓 𝑠𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑚𝑜𝑟𝑒 𝑎𝑛𝑑 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑛𝑜 𝑟𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡𝑜 𝑝𝑢𝑠ℎ 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑚 𝑖𝑛𝑡𝑜 𝑢𝑛𝑐ℎ𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑤𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑠. 𝑇ℎ𝑒𝑦'𝑙𝑙 𝑓𝑖𝑛𝑑 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑖𝑟 𝑤𝑎𝑦 𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑒 𝑒𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑢𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑦, 𝑖𝑡'𝑠 𝑖𝑛𝑒𝑣𝑖𝑡𝑎𝑏𝑙𝑒. 𝑆𝑜 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑐𝑎𝑛 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑒 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑝𝑒𝑜𝑝𝑙𝑒 𝑓𝑜𝑟 𝑛𝑜𝑤, ℎ𝑒 𝑐𝑎𝑛 ℎ𝑎𝑣𝑒 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑢𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑤𝑜𝑛'𝑡 𝑠𝑝𝑜𝑖𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑎𝑡 𝑓𝑜𝑟 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝐼𝑛 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑒𝑛𝑑, 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑙𝑤𝑎𝑦𝑠 𝑐𝑜𝑚𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑜𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 ℎ𝑖𝑚. 𝑂𝑟 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑙𝑖𝑣𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑡𝑜𝑔𝑒𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 ℎ𝑎𝑠 𝑠𝑡𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑒𝑑 𝑑𝑎𝑡𝑖𝑛𝑔 𝑎𝑔𝑎𝑖𝑛. 𝐸𝑑𝑑𝑖𝑒 𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑙𝑖𝑠𝑒𝑠 ℎ𝑒'𝑠 𝑖𝑛 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝐵𝑢𝑐𝑘 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝑡𝑎𝑘𝑒𝑠 𝑡ℎ𝑒 𝑡𝑖𝑚𝑒 𝑡𝑜 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑜𝑢𝑔ℎ ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑓𝑒𝑒𝑙𝑖𝑛𝑔𝑠 - 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑡ℎ𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑒𝑛𝑒𝑑 𝑏𝑦 ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑒𝑠𝑡 𝑓𝑟𝑖𝑒𝑛𝑑'𝑠 𝑙𝑜𝑣𝑒𝑟𝑠.

entry.title: Everything’s Going Great
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,483Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Buck knew exactly what he was doing. He knew it was a felony. He knew it could cost him everything. He knew Bobby would be disappointed. He did it anyway. Because everything hurts. It never stops hurting. And Buck would do anything to make it all go quiet. Or: What if Buck took the fentanyl from the ambulance?

entry.title: Time in a bottle
entry.summary:
Author: DaniWib

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,650Chapters: 3/7Kudos: 67

Summary: After the failed intervention at Athena's house, Buck fled, his disbelief quickly swallowed by a rising tide of fury. Hen’s rant about no one caring echoed in his ears, each word piercing deep until his vision burned red. No one cared? No one? He had cared! He had tried to hold everyone together, checking in, reaching out, desperately trying to stop the 118 from falling apart. But they made it clear Buck's efforts weren’t wanted, weren’t needed, or in Hen’s case, didn’t even count. Just when Buck’s hurt and anger finally overflowed, he encountered someone with the power to change it all. A crossroads demon. [Fic is complete, chapters posted weekly Friday & Tuesday nights AEST]

entry.title: just a little bit of your heart (is all I'm asking for)
entry.summary:
Author: dbolterstar

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 362,222Chapters: 38/55Kudos: 384

Summary: “Does this change a thing between us?” Buck asks, his voice low, hands still framing Eddie’s face. He can feel the unsteady breaths leaving Eddie’s lips, warm against his own. Eddie looks wrecked. His cheeks are flushed, lips red and kiss-swollen, his glassy eyes locked on Buck’s mouth like it’s the only thing he can see. He looks as hungry as Buck feels. Buck feels Eddie’s fingers trace along his arms, squeezing just enough to leave his skin tingling. “I don’t know.” It’s not a yes—Buck’s not even sure he wants to hear a yes. But it’s so much better than the rejection Eddie threw at him before. “Alright,” Buck exhales, nodding like it’s nothing, even though it feels massive. Then he surges forward, catching Eddie’s mouth in his again. They don’t stop. Can’t. Their mouths are locked together like they’re trying to breathe each other in, like letting go for even a second would be unbearable.or; Eddie’s shame torments him. Buck would rather have a piece of Eddie than nothing at all. Miscommunication is their biggest enemy. Infidelity turns into their savior… or ends up being the thing that destroys them?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Childhood given, a life loved
entry.summary:
Author: Sian98

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,816Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 39

Summary: When Buck impulsively decides to adopt a baby from Safe Haven. Aurora, a tiny, impossibly charming little girl, becomes the center of attention and chaos from the moment she enters their lives.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I don't know what I do if something happened to you
entry.summary:
Author: CarpeDiem911

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,382Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 135

Summary: Bobby’s last words leave Buck lost in grief and guilt, slowly pulling him inward.As he retreats, Eddie is left on the outside, grasping for a connection that keeps slipping through his fingers.Sometimes, distance hurts more than loss.And sometimes, it takes everything breaking apart to bring two people back together.

entry.title: Is It Killing You Like It’s Killing Me?
entry.summary:
Author: UnlostDrarry

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,082Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 201

Summary: “You didn’t do anything, Buck,” Eddie replied quietly as he exhaled and pinched the bridge of his nose. “Then what’s wrong? Why won’t you talk to me? Why won’t you look at me? I try to reach out, emotionally and physically and you just- exactly! You just flinched! You won’t even let me put my hand on your shoulder! It’s like I’m diseased or something and I just want to know why! Why-” “Because I’m in love with you Buck!,” Eddie yelled, throwing his hands up in frustration. Silence. Eddie didn’t think he had ever heard silence quite this loud. “You’re in love with me?,” Buck asked slowly, as if he was savoring every individual word. “That’s it? That’s the problem?” “Yes, that’s the problem!” Eddie watched a multitude of emotions flicker over Buck’s face before he schooled his expression as he made up his mind about something. Title from The Story of Us by Taylor Swift

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: back between villages (and everything’s still)
entry.summary:
Author: kikibridges13

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,613Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 278

Summary: “I know this is difficult,” Angela continued. “But there is something else you need to know. The reason I’m calling.” Right, why was he getting a call from Child Protective Services after all? Unless... “Ali had a daughter,” Angela says. “Her name is Charlotte. She’s four.” Four. The number lands like a verdict. Four years. The same amount of time that had passed since he last spoke to Ali. Buck can feel his chest tighten, and he weakly removes his grip from the couch and up to his hand holding the phone. One. Two. Three. “She’s mine,” he whispered faintly. “Yes,” Angela confirmed. “Ali listed you as Charlotte’s biological father.” “I didn’t know,” Buck whispered. “I didn’t know.” *********** Post 6x11 In Another Life. Buck is struggling after the lightning strike, and gets a phone call that flips his world upside down. Or, another girl!Dad Buddie story nobody asked for.

entry.title: I Will Rescue You.
entry.summary:
Author: Ch3rryCxnt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 872Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 3

Summary: Buck tells everyone he’s fine after Nashville. Back home in LA, the memories of what happened—and what almost happened—won’t leave him. Pills help him sleep, help him forget, but they don’t fix the emptiness inside. Eddie notices something is wrong, but Buck keeps pushing him away, telling himself he doesn’t deserve to be saved.

entry.title: The Disastrous Life of Saiki K and Firehouse 118
entry.summary:
Author: Allhandsondeck83

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,306Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Time travel? That was normal, but universe jumping? That was a something that could ACTUALLY catch a psychic off guard. When teen psychic, Kusuo Saiki, wakes up in an alternate universe where he does not exist, in Los Angeles, California, he gets taken under the wing of Evan Buckley. He has to remain under the radar while navigating a different universe, trying to make sure his new guardian doesn't burn in a fire, all while trying to find his way back to his home universe. ----- aka my hyper fixation (the disastrous life of saiki k) and my best friend's hyper fixation (9-1-1) get a crossover with angst and Buddie okay bye
